name: WOLVERINE WORLD WIDE INC /DE/
summary: PART I General Wolverine World Wide, Inc. (the Company) is a leading designer, marketer and licensor of a broad range of quality casual footwear and apparel, performance outdoor and athletic footwear and apparel, kids' footwear, industrial work boots and apparel, and uniform shoes and boots.
